body.title: Replace spread_from_words with cortex spreading on WORD_GRAPH nodes
body.result: cortex.spread_word_graph() added; spread_from_words + predict_next delegate via _cortex back-ref; no wg_edges in word_graph.py; 14 tests pass
body.intention: I intend that spreading activation is one unified primitive over the memory graph, covering both cognitive memories and word-graph nodes.
body.description:
After wg words are memory nodes, spread_from_words() currently queries wg_edges (flat 1.1M-row table). Replace with cortex.spreading_activation() starting from WORD_GRAPH seed nodes traversing links_weighted edges. predict_next() similarly updated. Spreading activation traversal is now bounded by tree/calving limits, not flat table size.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/cognition/word_graph.py (spread_from_words delegates to cortex; predict_next queries links_weighted from WORD_GRAPH memories), devices/igor/memory/cortex.py (spreading_activation handles WORD_GRAPH seed type), devices/igor/cognition/narrative_engine.py (verify callers unchanged)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; OOP-first; no new standalone functions — extend cortex.spreading_activation(); WORD_GRAPH tree interim calving threshold = 5000 (bigger than 1000 default while timing data is gathered)
**Scope boundary:** IN: spread_from_words delegates to cortex; predict_next uses links_weighted from WORD_GRAPH memories; IGOR_CALVING_THRESHOLD for WORD_GRAPH tree set to 5000. OUT: wg_cooccur write path removal (T-wg-cooccur-retire), graph_cache Redis layer (also T-wg-cooccur-retire)
**Completion criteria:** spread_from_words() returns equivalent top-5 words as pre-migration for 3 known seed phrases (integration test uses pre-recorded expected output); spread latency < 5ms for 2-hop from 10 seeds (benchmark); no direct SELECT on wg_edges in word_graph.py post-merge.
